name: Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Capstone has pioneered the future of low-emissions oil free power and energy technology for almost four decades. Our very low maintenance intervals allow for high availability rates, thus making us a leader of sustainable clean energy technology solutions worldwide. Our commitment to safety, innovation and operational excellence helps set the gold standard for holistic, sustainable energy solutions that deliver results. Capstone strives to be the first choice when energy matter...
